시편 88:1.content: Yahweh, the God of my salvation, I have cried day and night before you.

시편 88:2.content: Let my prayer enter into your presence. Turn your ear to my cry.

시편 88:3.content: For my soul is full of troubles. My life draws near to Sheol.

시편 88:4.content: I am counted among those who go down into the pit. I am like a man who has no help,

시편 88:5.content: set apart among the dead, like the slain who lie in the grave, whom you remember no more. They are cut off from your hand.

시편 88:6.content: You have laid me in the lowest pit, in the darkest depths.

시편 88:7.content: Your wrath lies heavily on me. You have afflicted me with all your waves.

시편 88:8.content: You have taken my friends from me. You have made me an abomination to them. I am confined, and I can’t escape.

시편 88:9.content: My eyes are dim from grief. I have called on you daily, Yahweh. I have spread out my hands to you.

시편 88:10.content: Do you show wonders to the dead? Do the departed spirits rise up and praise you?

시편 88:11.content: Is your loving kindness declared in the grave? Or your faithfulness in Destruction?

시편 88:12.content: Are your wonders made known in the dark? Or your righteousness in the land of forgetfulness?

시편 88:13.content: But to you, Yahweh, I have cried. In the morning, my prayer comes before you.

시편 88:14.content: Yahweh, why do you reject my soul? Why do you hide your face from me?

시편 88:15.content: I am afflicted and ready to die from my youth up. While I suffer your terrors, I am distracted.

시편 88:16.content: Your fierce wrath has gone over me. Your terrors have cut me off.

시편 88:17.content: They came around me like water all day long. They completely engulfed me.

시편 88:18.content: You have put lover and friend far from me, and my friends into darkness.
